title: LA12 9DR, Glaxo Operations UK Limited: permit partial surrender issued - EPR/BM4350ID/S006
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit, decision document and site condition report evaluation template for:   Operator name: Glaxo Operations UK Limited Installation name: Ulverston Pharmaceuticals Permit number: EPR/BM4350ID/S006  "
